task: feat: add market gap entry guard (2순위 작업, MONE_AGNAS_remaining_work_plan.txt section 4)
definitionNote: MARKET_GAP failureReason (set in virtual_trade_journal.py) only fires for entry_type=NEXT_OPEN trades that hit STOP_HIT where the actual fill price deviated >2% from the recommended entry price. It is a subset of stop failures attributable specifically to the overnight/next-open gap, not all gap exposure.

causeCandidatesTop.summary: KR market-gap rate (25.75% of NEXT_OPEN trades) is about 4x the US rate (6.38%). Previous-close-based entry prices appear far more exposed to KR overnight/opening volatility than US.

Average gap direction for the gap-failure group is -1.32% (KR -0.81%, US -3.52%), i.e. opens below the recommended entry price dominate, consistent with the work plan's '전일 종가 기준 추천 후 다음날 시초가 갭 발생' concern.

notableButLimited.sessionSplit: All 1445 evaluated trades come from a single journal_session (AFTER_CLOSE_TRADE) -- the work plan's '장전 추천과 장중 추천 분리' cannot be tested with current data because only one capture session type is present.
notableButLimited.modeHorizonFlat: Mode (13.9%-16.8%) and horizon (14.2%-16.9%) gap rates are fairly flat -- market (KR vs US) is by far the dominant differentiator, not mode or horizon.
notableButLimited.limitTouchSideFinding: LIMIT_TOUCH entries (n=84, small) showed much worse aggregate stats (avgReturn -8.99%, stopFailRate 57.1%) than NEXT_OPEN (avgReturn -0.58%, 20.4%) in this dataset -- not directly part of this gap diagnostic, but worth a separate look given the small sample makes it noisy.

decision.rationale: Per the work plan, gap risk should start as a risk flag / action-downgrade candidate, not candidate exclusion, and only after before/after validation. This change adds diagnostics only.

recommendedNextStep: If pursued: scope any future guard to KR NEXT_OPEN entries specifically (where the effect is concentrated and return impact is severe, -4.38% avg vs -0.32% for non-gap KR NEXT_OPEN trades), e.g. flagging a gap-risk warning or downgrading action for KR NEXT_OPEN recommendations issued after a large prior-day move, then validating with before/after replay before any live change.
